---
title: Week 7 Resources
nocite: |
  @gelman2013bda-ch10
  @gelman2013bda-ch11
  gelman2013bda-ch12
  @metropolis1949monte
  @metropolis1953equation
  @gelfand1990sampling
  @gelfand1990illustration
  @hoffman2014no
  @burkner2017brms
  @vehtari2021rank
  @mcelreath2020rethinking-ch9
---

::: {#refs}
:::
